description: Modulation → amp.level. A stepped bipolar LFO modulates the level of a steady 16th-note hat stream. Measured with 250 ms windows (wider than the 125 ms hit spacing) so the per-hit envelope averages out and only the slow tremolo shows: un-modulated the level is flat (~0 dB range), modulated it swings ~8 dB. Proves the amp.level modulation write-back path.

assertions.name: audio_present
assertions.comment: the hat stream must be sounding

assertions.name: level_oscillates
assertions.comment: tremolo swings the windowed level >4 dB; un-modulated baseline is ~0 dB
